# Aster.Net

> Strongly typed .NET client library for the Aster DEX REST and WebSocket APIs. Supports Spot V3 and Futures V3 trading, with V1 compatibility branches. Part of the CryptoExchange.Net ecosystem providing a unified abstraction across cryptocurrency exchanges.

Aster.Net provides strongly typed public and private endpoints, automatic WebSocket reconnection, comprehensive error handling via the `WebCallResult<T>` / `CallResult<T>` pattern, native AOT support, and SharedApis integration for exchange-agnostic code. Current package version in this repository: 3.2.1. Targets netstandard2.0, netstandard2.1, net8.0, net9.0, net10.0.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/JKorf/Aster.Net/blob/master/README.md): Overview, installation, supported features, basic usage examples, release notes
- [Documentation Site](https://cryptoexchange.jkorf.dev/Aster.Net/): Full documentation hub including client reference, WebSocket subscriptions, dependency injection, and shared interfaces
- [AI API Quick Map](https://github.com/JKorf/Aster.Net/blob/master/docs/ai-api-map.md): Quick intent-to-method map for routing common user requests to the correct V3 client member
- [Full LLM Context](https://github.com/JKorf/Aster.Net/blob/master/llms-full.txt): Detailed AI/LLM guide with code patterns, endpoint map, common mistakes, and anti-hallucination rules

## Examples

- [AI-friendly examples directory](https://github.com/JKorf/Aster.Net/tree/master/Examples/ai-friendly): Compact examples optimized for AI assistants and quick onboarding
- [Spot V3 Quickstart](https://github.com/JKorf/Aster.Net/blob/master/Examples/ai-friendly/01-spot-quickstart.cs): Client setup, ticker, account balance, limit order placement, order status check
- [Futures V3 Trading](https://github.com/JKorf/Aster.Net/blob/master/Examples/ai-friendly/02-futures.cs): Futures leverage, market order, position retrieval, position close
- [WebSocket Streams](https://github.com/JKorf/Aster.Net/blob/master/Examples/ai-friendly/03-websocket.cs): Ticker and kline subscriptions with proper teardown
- [Multi-Exchange Pattern](https://github.com/JKorf/Aster.Net/blob/master/Examples/ai-friendly/04-multi-exchange.cs): Using CryptoExchange.Net SharedApis for exchange-agnostic code
- [Error Handling](https://github.com/JKorf/Aster.Net/blob/master/Examples/ai-friendly/05-error-handling.cs): WebCallResult pattern, retry logic, common errors and their handling

## Reference

- [CryptoExchange.Net base library](https://github.com/JKorf/CryptoExchange.Net): Base abstractions used by Aster.Net and other exchange libraries
- [CryptoClients.Net](https://github.com/JKorf/CryptoClients.Net): Bundle package providing unified access to exchange libraries
- [NuGet Package](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Jkorf.Aster.Net): Latest stable release on NuGet
- [Discord Community](https://discord.gg/MSpeEtSY8t): Maintainer-supported Discord for questions and discussion
